title: Vetula Calceocola.
Magi Gothamenses.
content:

title: Lunicola.

title: Rex Arthurus.
content:
When King Arthur ruled the land,
	    He ruled it like a king:
	 He bought four pecks of barley-meal
	    To make a brave pudding.

title: Homunculus Et Puellula.
content:

title: Grumbo Gigas.
content:
Fee! faw! fum!
	 I smell the blood of an Englishman.
	 Dead or alive, I will have some.

	    Fe! fau! fum!
	    Sanguinem odoror Anglicum.

title: Mors Turdo-Galli.
content:
Who killed Cock Robin?
	    I, says the sparrow;
	    With my bow and arrow,
	 I killed Cock Robin.


	    Quis Turdo-gallum necavit?

title: Diccora Dogium.
content:

	 The mouse ran up the clock,
